calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:22am
Judge Pro Tem David May, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on the record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, appellant Duk-Shin Moon, present with attorney Steven S. Miyake, 5 respondents are also present: Joseph Anthony Ornelas, Micaela Maria Ornelas, Jason King, Marco Cardenas, Joshua Fritsch. All parties and witnesses, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Judge David May reviews and retains some evidence, but does not have the clerk mark or identify any evidence.
10:20am
Court takes a recess to allow parties to meet and confer about a possible settlement.
12:10pm
Court resumes all present.
12:20pm
Court adjourns. (Judge May put SCA evidence back in the Small Claims evidence envelope without returning it. Parties will be informed to retrieve their own evidence.)Mr. Miyake name is added as appellant's address in IJS so he will receive the SCA judgment.
